name: Muspelheim Weather
description: The suffocating heat of the fire realm.

results.text: Ash Storm: Visibility zero. Disadvantage on Swift. Test Fortitude DR12 each hour or take d4 damage.
Molten Rain: Fiery debris. Test Swift DR14 or suffer d6 damage.
Blistering Mirage: Intense heat wave. Shifting surreal visions.
Red Lightning Storm: Random strikes. Test Swift DR12 or take d6 damage.
Volcanic Tremors: Terrain shifts. Test Swift DR12 or fall into lava crevasses.
Cleansing Ember Winds: Burning impurities. +2 to Fortitude Tests tomorrow.
Abandoned Forge: Reactivating risks lava eruption (Test Swift DR12).
Molten Pool: Imbue weapon with +d6 fire dmg (d4 days). Risk destroying it (Test Fortitude DR12).
Fire-Resistant Ore Vein: Mining requires Might DR12. May draw Molten Hounds.
Smouldering Corpse: Contains d3 Runes. Might be trapped.
Volcanic Chamber: Runic walls. Might DR12 to pry free.
Petrified Remains: Secrets of ancient civilisations or cursed items.
"Eldrimnir is reshaping Muspelheim into an unstoppable fortress."
"Logi wanders the fields, seeking worthy opponents to test his flames."
"The molten rivers hold memories, but many go mad watching them."
"Rival clans of fire giants are warring for the central volcano."
"The ground is on the brink of splitting open... Ragnarok is near."
